layer2_semantic: The Divine attribute of creating without precedent or model, bringing forth existence in ways that have never been before. Ibn Arabi uses this for Allah's capacity to manifest infinite novel forms without exhausting divine creativity, each moment being an unprecedented theophany
layer3_numerical: ب=2 (duality/manifestation), د=4 (stability/establishment), ع=70 (hidden knowledge) = 76 total, encoding the movement from primal duality through stable manifestation into the vast realm of divine gnosis

abjad_resonances: 76 resonates with divine creativity and manifestation. Connects numerically to names of divine artistry and the unfolding of infinite possibilities from divine essence
paired_opposite: Al-Hakīm (The Wise) - where Al-Badīʿ creates the unprecedented, Al-Hakīm ensures it follows perfect divine wisdom and order, balancing radical creativity with eternal principles
